name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x v0.31: cc_font_8.png glyph atlas (64 chars at 8x8, DMG-quantized) shipped under sprites/ for shared brand typography across screens. Title screen now layers a BOOTSEQUENCE version band (swappable per USB build via CC_VERSION_BAND env var) above the MERIDIAN 2026 / PRESS START footer — replaces RBY's RED VERSION / BLUE VERSION line. Carries forward v0.30 all_badges -> VESSEL chat persona + v0.29 ten_caught vault widget + v0.28 first_badge unlock spec + v0.27 save sidecar emitter + v0.25 cinderized creature set (DATA dots / LOGIC bracket / MEM 2x2 block / PROC arrow tail / CORE diagonal) + v0.24 ember-trade gym leaders (PYRE/KILN/HUSKE/WICK/HEARTH) + v0.21 branded title + player-name entry (EVENT_TEXT_INPUT into VAR_PLAYER_NAME, 7-char Pokemon-RBY length) + v0.20 Achievements page + v0.19 Codex tab + v0.18 VOID final fight + v0.17 CORE / v0.16 DATA / v0.15 PROC / v0.14 MEM / v0.12 LOGIC gyms + v0.13 catch loop + v0.11 USB-driven encounter pool + 5-type chart. Adventure Plus + Advanced Dialogue 2 + Advanced Menu 2 plugins also installed in this build.
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
